name: ezmdv
description: Easy Markdown Viewer — browser-based markdown viewer launched from the CLI

scripts.prebuild: test -d node_modules/.bin || (echo 'Error: run npm install first' && exit 1)
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/cli -w packages/web
scripts.dev:server: cd packages/server && npm run build && node dist/index.js
